name: heimdall
facts: Multi-model AI orchestration system using profile + task-routing architecture
All AI providers invoked through ccs (Claude Code Switch) so every provider shares CLAUDE.md, agents, commands, hooks, MCP config
Python 3.8+ stdlib-only (except optional PyYAML for ai_do)
Pytest-based TDD: tmp_path fixtures, real symlink I/O, mocked subprocess for tmux

name: ai_profile
facts: Phase 1 — complete
Manages ~/.ai-profiles/ → ~/.claude/ symlink lifecycle
cmd_load: symlinks {profile}/__{filename} into ~/.claude/{agents,commands,skills,hooks}/, appends profile CLAUDE.md, deep-merges settings.json
cmd_unload: removes symlinks by prefix, rebuilds CLAUDE.md and settings.json from remaining active profiles
Active state persisted in ~/.ai-profiles/.active (space-separated profile names)
Symlinks prefixed {profile_name}__{filename} to prevent collisions
merge_settings: mcpServers shallow-merged, hooks recursively merged, lists concatenated+deduplicated
ENV: AI_CLAUDE_DIR (default ~/.claude), AI_PROFILES_DIR (default ~/.ai-profiles)

name: ai_dispatch
facts: Phase 2 — complete
tmux-based task dispatcher
dispatch(task, profile, session): loads profile if given, ensures tmux session+window, runs 'claude -p <task>' in pane, polls for <<<DONE>>> sentinel, returns captured output
Each profile gets its own named tmux window within ai-do session
SENTINEL = <<<DONE>>>
run_in_pane appends '; echo <<<DONE>>>' to command and polls tmux_capture_pane every 1s up to timeout (default 120s)
ENV: AI_DISPATCH_SESSION (default: ai-do), AI_PROFILES_DIR, AI_CLAUDE_DIR
CLI: ai-dispatch run <task> [--profile <name>] [--session <name>]

name: ai_do
facts: Phase 3 — planned, not yet implemented
Keyword-based task router
Reads models.yaml + routing.yaml from ~/.ai-profiles/orchestrator/
route(task, rules): tokenises task (lowercase, non-alphanumeric split), first-match wins, default (claude, backup)
get_ccs_cmd(name, models): returns cmd string from models registry
dispatch_task(): load YAMLs, route or force_model, optionally load profile, call ai_dispatch.dispatch()
CLI: ai-do run <task> [--model <name>] [--dry-run] [--session <name>]
load_yaml: tries PyYAML first, falls back to stdlib regex parser for simple schema
--dry-run prints routing decision without dispatching

name: orchestrator_config
facts: Located at ~/.ai-profiles/orchestrator/
models.yaml: registry of models with cmd, strengths[], failover fields
routing.yaml: rules list with match[], primary, fallback fields
models: claude(ccs), backup(ccs backup), gemini(ccs gemini), codex(ccs codex), deepseek(ccs deepseek), glm(ccs glm), km(ccs km), openrouter(ccs openrouter), qwen(ccs qwen)
routing keywords: architecture/planning→deepseek, implement/generate→codex, analyze/large_context→gemini, review/debug→claude, docs/readme→glm, research/web→gemini, repetitive/format→glm

name: profile_layout
facts: ~/.ai-profiles/{profile}/ contains: agents/, commands/, skills/, hooks/, CLAUDE.md, settings.json
base/ profile always-on baseline
orchestrator/ reserved — excluded from cmd_list and symlink loading
SUBDIRS = (agents, commands, skills, hooks)
Symlink naming: {profile_name}__{filename}

name: test_suite
facts: 65 tests passing before Phase 3 (per plan pre-flight note)
tests/conftest.py: claude_dir, profiles_dir, profile_a fixtures using tmp_path
tests/test_commands.py: cmd_load, cmd_unload, cmd_status, cmd_list + CLI subprocess tests
tests/test_symlinks.py: symlink creation/removal
tests/test_merge.py: merge_settings logic
tests/test_dispatch.py: all tmux primitives mocked with subprocess.run patch; dispatch/ensure_pane/run_in_pane integration
Target: ≥80% coverage per CLAUDE.md
TDD workflow: write failing test → implement → refactor
Phase 3 target: tests/test_ai_do.py with 26 tests across load_yaml, route, get_model/get_ccs_cmd, dispatch_task, main CLI

name: build_roadmap
facts: Phase 1 (Complete): Profile loader ai-profile load/unload/status/list
Phase 2 (Complete): ai-dispatch run <task> via tmux
Phase 3 (Planned): ai-do keyword extraction → model routing → CCS invocation; plan at docs/plans/2026-04-06-ai-do-phase3.md
Phase 4 (Planned): Checkpoint/resume + failover on quota hit
Phase 5 (Planned): ai-status dashboard, ai-do --split
Phase 6 (Planned): Update subagents task-runner to use CCS invocation
ai_do.dispatch_task() calls ai_dispatch.dispatch() for actual tmux execution
ai_dispatch.load_profile() calls ai_profile.cmd_load() to activate profile before dispatch
Reads models.yaml and routing.yaml from ~/.ai-profiles/orchestrator/ at dispatch time
cmd_load/unload create/remove symlinks following the profile_layout conventions

name: limits_and_failures
facts: run_in_pane raises TimeoutError after timeout seconds (default 120s) if SENTINEL not seen — no retry logic
Quota/limit hit during claude execution has no failover yet (Phase 4)
_parse_yaml_simple is intentionally minimal — only handles models.yaml/routing.yaml schema; complex YAML will break it
merge_settings list dedup uses command key for hook dicts, identity for scalars — order-sensitive
symlink_profile skips if dst symlink already exists and is valid; removes broken symlinks silently
cmd_load exits(1) on unknown profile; cmd_unload prints warning and returns on inactive profile
No parallel dispatch yet (Phase 5: ai-do --split)
orchestrator/ directory is a reserved name — excluded from cmd_list via _NON_PROFILE_DIRS set

name: phase3_next_actions
facts: Next: implement src/ai_do.py following docs/plans/2026-04-06-ai-do-phase3.md
Task 1: load_yaml (stdlib fallback + PyYAML)
Task 2: route() keyword tokeniser
Task 3: get_model() + get_ccs_cmd()
Task 4: dispatch_task() with dry-run support
Task 5: main() CLI entry point
Task 6: scaffold ~/.ai-profiles/orchestrator/models.yaml + routing.yaml
All tests in tests/test_ai_do.py — 26 tests total targeting ≥80% coverage
Register entry point in pyproject.toml: ai-do = ai_do:main
